items.caption: A collection of motorola two-way radios, including handheld devices and a base station, arranged on a flat surface. the devices are organized in two rows, with the base station in the center. the base station has a control panel with a display screen and various buttons and ports. the handheld radios are placed on top of the base station, with some standing upright and others lying flat. the devices are predominantly black and gray, with some featuring green and white accents.
someone is holding a handheld device in front of a desk
The picture shows a standard handheld maritime VHF as required under the GMDSS rules for merchant vessels. Picture taken onboard the M/F Bastø 2 18 November 2005.
items.creator: No machine-readable author provided. Ulflarsen assumed (based on copyright claims).
